scope: Immutable policy correction of v6: manufacturer-printed retailer-exclusive marks supported by exact package-art references are product markings, not overlays. Removes the false retailer-badge defect from 13 rows, promotes 8 rows with no residual defect to KEEP, and preserves or records every independent defect.

supersedes_prior_correction.reason: v6 incorrectly treated authentic manufacturer-printed retailer-exclusive package markings as prohibited overlays.

decision_semantics.KEEP: No concrete visual defect was found. This is a visual KEEP only and is not marketplace publish authorization.
decision_semantics.REPAIR: At least one concrete blocking visual defect was found; image must be repaired/replaced before any publish.
decision_semantics.NEEDS_EVIDENCE: Reserved for unresolved visual identity/count ambiguity. None remained after this review.

provenance_gate.warning: Even KEEP rows remain pending the separate v2.0 GPT Image 2 generation-manifest, ordered-reference byte hashes, output hash, and image-bound human approval gates.

methodology: Read the complete frozen MAIN Image Spec v2.0 and the v6 immutable audit.

Re-opened all 13 original-resolution assets carrying RETAILER_BADGE_VISIBLE and checked count math, loose ice, physical seating, gel-pack count/branding, cooler branding, flavor identity, and visible package integrity independently of the badge.
Compared the observed Target/Walmart marks against the pinned exact manufacturer/package references.

Classified a retailer mark printed on authentic product packaging as part of the product. A model-added overlay, mismatched retailer mark, or altered package remains forbidden under the existing fictional/altered-art rules.
Confirmed eight rows have no residual defect; ordinal 30 retains visible loose ice; ordinals 131/141/159/161 retain carton-count math mismatches.
No generation, Amazon read/write, ChannelMAX read/write, database operation, or object-store operation was performed.

reason_catalog.CARTON_COUNT_MATH_MISMATCH: Visible retail-carton count/pack-size arithmetic does not exactly reconcile to every recipe quantity.
reason_catalog.INDIVIDUAL_WRAPPER_HAS_CARTON_COUNT_BADG: A purported individual wrapper visibly retains a retail carton pack-count badge.
reason_catalog.MINI_CARTON_PRESENTED_AS_WRAPPER: Retail carton front art was shrunk onto a crimped pouch and presented as an individual wrapper.
reason_catalog.WRONG_FLAVOR_VISIBLE: At least one visible product/flavor is not the exact recipe product.
reason_catalog.MISSING_RECIPE_COMPONENT: At least one required recipe component is not visibly represented.
reason_catalog.FICTIONAL_OR_ALTERED_PACKAGE_ART: Visible package art is fabricated, corrupted, or materially altered from reviewed genuine art.
reason_catalog.WRONG_NUTRITION_OR_VARIANT_TEXT: Visible package text/nutrition identifies the wrong product variant.
reason_catalog.GENERIC_OR_UNBRANDED_PACKAGE: Visible package is generic or lacks authentic readable Smucker's/Uncrustables identity.
reason_catalog.NO_APPROVED_COOLER_SCENE: The approved Salutem cooler/gel-pack frozen-shipping scene is absent.
reason_catalog.PRODUCT_PHYSICAL_SEATING_FAIL: Products are pasted, floating, outside, or otherwise not physically seated behind the cooler rim.
reason_catalog.GEL_PACK_COUNT_OR_LAYOUT_FAIL: The image does not contain exactly two approved gel packs inside plus two outside.
reason_catalog.GEL_PACK_BRANDING_FAIL: One or more gel packs have altered/missing approved branding.
reason_catalog.SALUTEM_BRANDING_FAIL: Cooler Salutem emblem/wordmark/slogan is altered, missing, or incorrect.
reason_catalog.VISIBLE_UNIT_COUNT_NOT_RECONCILED: Visible individual-unit quantities do not reconcile to the recipe quantity/components.
reason_catalog.LOOSE_ICE_VISIBLE: Loose ice, ice cubes, or ice chunks are visibly present; the frozen MAIN spec permits only sealed gel packs plus subtle frost/condensation.
reason_catalog.VISIBLE_TEXT_INTEGRITY_FAIL: At original resolution, visible manufacturer package microcopy and/or required Salutem kit wording contains materially malformed letterforms or distorted text rather than clean source-art rendering; this is a visual finding and does not assert an OCR transcription.
